analysis.image: a hand outstretched in an empty room
analysis.take: The past feels vividly present. You reach out for what was, but only feel air. The world keeps moving on a different axis.

arc.label: Intro
arc.scene: A young voice calls out from a distant memory.

arc.label: Verse 1
arc.scene: Invisible hands pull you back as the world moves on.

arc.label: Chorus
arc.scene: You meet another set of eyes in a world that feels completely new.

arc.label: Verse 2
arc.scene: A worried voice asks why you are sitting alone on the floor.

arc.label: Bridge
arc.scene: You try to outrun the memories, speeding into a different future.

arc.label: Outro
arc.scene: The truth settles in. Nothing will ever be the same.

lines.insight: Something unseen keeps you tethered to a previous place.

lines.line: In this world, it's just us
lines.insight: A shared isolation builds a fragile new bond.

lines.line: You know it's not the same as it was
lines.insight: The defining truth of this moment echoes through everything.
The concern of others pulls you back from self-imposed solitude.

lines.line: I don't wanna talk about the way that it was
lines.insight: Avoiding the past becomes a way to move through the present.

analysis.texture: A bright neon shimmer lays over a driving drum beat. The propulsive energy carries a quiet sadness.
